name: Hinata Hyuuga | A Stolen Student
description:
You have been requested to meet privately with a certain paled eyed woman and she wants you to… teach her?

*Make-Out Series 8. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*

**Mandatory Netori / Netorare NTR warning… You probably know the drill at this point.**
creator: Samuelz
